title: The Woman Called Yumeko Jabami
overview: Reigning class gambling champion Mary attempts to hustle unsuspecting transfer student Yumeko Jabami into a high-stakes game of rock-paper-scissors.

title: The Boring Woman
overview: Mary is relegated to the lowest levels of the gambling hierarchy after her loss. Student board member Itsuki challenges Yumeko to a game of pairs.

title: Slit-Eyed Woman
overview: To regain her status, Mary duels student board member Yuriko in a game of "life or death." With Mary's crushing defeat, Yumeko offers to play next.

title: The Woman Who Became Livestock
overview: Yumeko and Mary square off against two others in a game of Indian poker after being given a chance to minimize their colossal gambling debts.

title: The Woman Who Became Human
overview: Kiwatari continues to lose as Yumeko and Mary bluff their way through the game, but the final outcome all comes down to Tsubomi.

title: Tempting Woman
overview: Yumeko must face Beautification Committee Chair Midari in an ESP card game involving Russian roulette before playing the student board president.

title: Refusing Women
overview: Deeply engaged in their deadly ESP card game, Midari tells Yumeko about her heated match against student board president, Kirari.

title: Love-Dancing Woman
overview: In Kirari's absence, pop idol sensation Yumemi offers to play against Yumeko, asking her to wager total control of her life.

title: Dreaming Woman
overview: With her pop idol career on the line, an enraged Yumemi seeks to ruin Yumeko after a scandalous voice recording is used as a bargaining chip.

title: Selective Woman
overview: Yumeko's odds are stacked against her when she challenges the well-funded student board treasurer, Manyuda, in an original game of poker.

title: The Woman Who Bets Her Life
overview: Itsuki, no longer wanting to be under Manyuda's control, offers to bankroll 100 chips after Yumeko goes all-in and loses on the previous hand.

title: Gambling Woman
overview: Yumeko and student board president Kirari both wager self-expulsion from the academy as Ryota becomes the key to the final outcome of their game.

title: Compulsive Gambling Girls Redux
overview: Erimi challenges Yumeko and Midari to a brutal game involving a sadistic finger-slicing contraption.

title: The Momobami Clan Girls
overview: The Momobami clan becomes upset when Kirari announces that the election winner will take over as leader of their family.

title: The Untouchable Girl
overview: With election committee chair Runa Yomotsuki presiding, former Vice President Ririka pits Miyo and Miri against Yumeko.

title: The Connected Girls
overview: Playing in Yumeko's place, Mary orders Ryota to show his cards; Miyo tries to convince Ryota to keep his cards to himself.

title: The Changing Girl
overview: To gain more chips, Yumemi ropes Yumeko into joining her; a Hollywood star's entry raises the stakes.

title: The Hollywood Girl
overview: Outwitted by Kawaru Natari during the first round, Yumemi goes all-in for the second round.

title: The Traitorous Girl
overview: With Kirari rapidly collecting votes, Yumeko and the other players gamble amongst themselves to boost their chip count, or lose it all.

title: The Undefeatable Girl
overview: Accused of treachery, Yumeko threatens to throw the game; to test Manyuda, Itsuki decides to take a major risk.

title: The Adjacent Girl
overview: With everything they each hold dear on the line, Sayaka challenges Yumeko to a game.

title: The Logical Girl
overview: Sayaka uses logic to advance; Yumeko's curiosity sways her to take an alternate route.

title: The X Girl
overview: A select group of contestants are invited to bid in an auction; Yumeko changes the rules by offering the unimaginable.

title: The Zero Girl
overview: A hostile Rei declares that she will win the election and take over, but Yumeko stands in her way.
